title: Well Tested
objective: Memorize and replay expanding pulse patterns across six local well caps, keeping the pressure test alive long enough to post the highest score on the leaderboard.

controls.outcome: Inputs that well's beat in the current sequence.
Skips that step correctly when the twist marks one pulse as dry.
Begins the next faster, longer pattern immediately.

steps: A short melody plays across well caps arranged like a tiny local district map.
Watch and listen to the pulse order, then repeat it by tapping the same wells.
Each correct tap raises the combo and score multiplier; a full clean round adds bonus pressure time.
Every few rounds, one well turns dry and its pulse must be bypassed with a long-press instead of a tap.
Later rounds add faster timing, doubled beats, and decoy echo flashes that are seen but should not be played.
Miss a step, tap a decoy, or let the pressure timer empty three times and the test fails.
scoring: Score comes from correct inputs, speed, and clean-round bonuses. Consecutive perfect rounds increase a multiplier up to x8, but any mistake breaks the combo. Leaderboard rank is based on total score from a single 2-4 min
tips: Listen for pitch as much as position; each well has its own tone.
Use long-press only on cracked dry wells; decoy echoes never need input.
Cash into the next round quickly to preserve pressure and keep the multiplier climbing.

trendContext.title: Show HN: A game that tests how well you know your local area
